items.caption: An old-style confessional booth in a church. the booth is constructed of dark wood with a pointed arch at the top and is adorned with a curtain that hangs from a rod above the entrance. the booth is situated between two tall, beige pillars that are part of the church's architecture. the floor is tiled, and the walls are painted in a light color, providing a contrast to the dark wood of the booth. the overall atmosphere of the image is solemn and reverent, typical of a place of worship.
